data.content: Cross-agent review for pool dispatch is fully implemented. All code changes are in place: agent-pool.ts (excludeAgentId param, step agent tracking), workflows.ts (isReviewStep/priorActionStep helpers), types.ts (agentId on RegisteredAgent), settings.ts (cross-agent review logic in getStepAgent), terminal-manager.ts (take loop stops for cross-agent review). Tests pass (59/59). No new code changes needed.
